ogTitle: Lake Brewster vs Lake Cargelligo: Climate Safety

heading: Lake Brewster vs Lake Cargelligo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Brewster, New South Wales and Lake Cargelligo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Brewster has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Lake Cargelligo (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Brewster or Lake Cargelligo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Brewster has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Lake Cargelligo scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Brewster scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Cargelligo scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Brewster or Lake Cargelligo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Brewster has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
